title: Capacity Planning Decision Algorithm
description: Algorithm to determine when to scale capacity based on utilization thresholds
code:
ALGORITHM CheckCapacityScaling
INPUT: CurrentUtilization, ThresholdWarning, ThresholdCritical
OUTPUT: ScalingAction

BEGIN
 IF CurrentUtilization >= ThresholdCritical THEN
 RETURN "IMMEDIATE SCALE UP REQUIRED"
 ELSE IF CurrentUtilization >= ThresholdWarning THEN
 RETURN "PLAN SCALING WITHIN 1 WEEK"
 ELSE IF CurrentUtilization < 30% THEN
 RETURN "CONSIDER SCALING DOWN TO REDUCE COSTS"
 ELSE
 RETURN "CAPACITY ADEQUATE - CONTINUE MONITORING"
 END IF
END
explanation: This algorithm helps automate capacity decisions based on utilization thresholds, ensuring timely response to capacity issues.

title: Capacity Forecasting Using Moving Average
description: Simple forecasting algorithm using historical data
code:
ALGORITHM ForecastCapacity(HistoricalData[], Periods)
INPUT: Array of past utilization values, number of periods to average
OUTPUT: Forecasted capacity need

BEGIN
 Sum = 0
 FOR i = 0 TO Periods-1 DO
 Sum = Sum + HistoricalData[i]
 END FOR
 
 MovingAverage = Sum / Periods
 GrowthFactor = 1.15 // Assume 15% growth
 ForecastedNeed = MovingAverage * GrowthFactor
 
 Buffer = ForecastedNeed * 0.20 // 20% buffer
 FinalForecast = ForecastedNeed + Buffer
 
 RETURN FinalForecast
END
explanation: Uses moving average with growth projection and buffer to forecast future capacity needs.

title: Load Balancer Distribution Algorithm
description: Simple round-robin load balancing for distributing requests across servers
code:
ALGORITHM DistributeRequest(Request, ServerList[])
INPUT: Incoming request, list of available servers
OUTPUT: Server to handle the request

BEGIN
 // Simple Round-Robin
 Static CurrentIndex = 0
 
 ServerCount = Length(ServerList)
 SelectedServer = ServerList[CurrentIndex]
 
 CurrentIndex = (CurrentIndex + 1) MOD ServerCount
 
 RETURN SelectedServer
END

// Alternative: Least Connections Algorithm
ALGORITHM FindLeastLoadedServer(ServerList[])
BEGIN
 MinLoad = Infinity
 BestServer = NULL
 
 FOR EACH server IN ServerList DO
 IF server.CurrentConnections < MinLoad THEN
 MinLoad = server.CurrentConnections
 BestServer = server
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN BestServer
END
explanation: Round-robin distributes equally; least-connections sends to server with fewest active connections for better load distribution.
